message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-mcp-routing): pin route_mcp_method dispatch + McpMethodCategory predicates + SessionStatus contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-d51an)

28 tests pinning the agent-facing MCP method dispatch contract.
Drift in even one mapping silently routes a method to the wrong
category, breaking auth/logging/rate-limit gating.

- 10 explicit method mappings: initialize / tools/list / tools/call /
  resources/list / resources/read / prompts/list / prompts/get /
  completion/complete / logging/setLevel / ping
- notifications/<anything> prefix routes to Notification
- bare 'notifications' (no slash) falls through to Unknown
- Unknown fallback case-sensitive (Initialize, tools/LIST → Unknown)
- expects_response false ONLY for Notification (every other variant
  expects a JSON-RPC response, including Unknown for error
  propagation)
- requires_session false for Initialize / Ping / Unknown (bootstrap +
  keepalive + error propagation work pre-handshake)
- Display returns exact wire-method literal for the 10 routable
  + 2 synthetic (notification, unknown) categories
- Display ↔ route round-trip for the 10 routable categories
- Hash + Copy + Eq for HashMap-keyed counters
- 12 distinct variants (no enum collisions)
- SessionStatus 4 snake_case variants (active/idle/expired/
  terminated) + reject mixed-case + Copy + Hash + distinct

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

+[[bin]]
